# Trace Element Chemistry

**Summary**: The chemical analysis of trace elements to identify source rock types.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999]] used trace element chemistry to distinguish between different provenance sources.

## Key Results and Findings

- Cr/Ni, V/Cr, and V/Ni ratios were predominantly within the range of basement samples, indicating acidic to intermediate source terrains. ([[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999, p. 170]])
